changes: Players can now change their egi's outward appearance by completing the 'An Egi by Any Other Name' side quest.
The /egiglamour text command has been added to change egi appearance (Emerald Carbuncle, Topaz Carbuncle, Ruby Carbuncle).
Egi glamour appearances are saved when logging out.
Resolved an issue wherein the summoner action Enkindle does not behave properly under certain conditions.
Resolved an issue wherein the Raise status effect granted by the arcanist action Resurrection cannot be overwritten by the conjurer action Raise or the astrologian action Ascend.
Resolved an issue with the black mage action Sleep wherein the help text stated it only affects a single target in PvP before acquiring the trait Deep Sleep.
An issue with the action Sleep wherein the help text stated it only affected a single target in PvP before acquiring the trait Deep Sleep has been resolved.
An issue wherein the action Warden's Paean could protect against multiple detrimental effects in PvP areas has been resolved.

new_content.name: Baelsar's Wall

new_content.description: A new level 60 extreme trial for eight players, requiring an average item level of 250 or above.

new_content.name: Dun Scaith
new_content.description: A new alliance raid dungeon for eight-player parties (alliance total), requiring an average item level of 235 or above.

new_content.name: Cross-World Party Finder
new_content.description: Expansion of the Party Finder to include players from all Worlds on the same data center.

new_content.name: Contact List
new_content.description: A social feature tracking the last fifty people the player has partied with.

new_content.name: Quick Chat
new_content.description: A communication system specifically for PvP matches where chat is disabled.

new_content.name: Picture Frames
new_content.description: Housing feature that allows players to display paintings in their estates or apartments.

new_content.name: Battlehall
new_content.description: New dedicated area for Triple Triad tournaments.
